mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.uid2 AS "uid2.id", a.group_id AS "group.id", a.info AS "info", a.state AS "state", a.type AS "type", a.showids AS "showids", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex",
uid2.nickname AS "uid2.nickname", uid2.icon AS "uid2.icon", uid2.sex AS "uid2.sex",
`group`.name AS "group.name"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_member uid2 ON uid2.id = a.uid2 LEFT JOIN t_group `group` ON `group`.id = a.group_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_group_apply( id, uid, uid2, group_id, info, state, type, showids, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{uid2.id}, #{group.id}, #{info}, #{state}, #{type}, #{showids}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_group_apply SET uid = #{u.id}, uid2 = #{uid2.id}, group_id = #{group.id}, info = #{info}, state = #{state}, type = #{type}, showids = #{showids}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
